'''âk-t-y-sh''' ('''kakatyeshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wench|wench]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-t-y-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wench|wench]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-t-y-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kakatyeshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikatyeshoko|thikatyeshoko]] || [[word:jikatyeshoko|jikatyeshoko]] || [[word:shikatyeshoko|shikatyeshoko]] || [[word:kikatyeshoko|kikatyeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukatyeshoko|thuthukatyeshoko]] || [[word:jujukatyeshoko|jujukatyeshoko]] || [[word:shushukatyeshoko|shushukatyeshoko]] || [[word:kukukatyeshoko|kukukatyeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukatyeshoko|thukatyeshoko]] || [[word:jukatyeshoko|jukatyeshoko]] || [[word:shukatyeshoko|shukatyeshoko]] || [[word:kukatyeshoko|kukatyeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukatyeshoko|thukatyeshoko]] || [[word:jukatyeshoko|jukatyeshoko]] || [[word:shukatyeshoko|shukatyeshoko]] || [[word:kukatyeshoko|kukatyeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekatyeshoko|thekatyeshoko]] || [[word:jekatyeshoko|jekatyeshoko]] || [[word:shekatyeshoko|shekatyeshoko]] || [[word:kekatyeshoko|kekatyeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokatyeshoko|thothokatyeshoko]] || [[word:jojokatyeshoko|jojokatyeshoko]] || [[word:shoshokatyeshoko|shoshokatyeshoko]] || [[word:kokokatyeshoko|kokokatyeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokatyeshoko|thokatyeshoko]] || [[word:jokatyeshoko|jokatyeshoko]] || [[word:shokatyeshoko|shokatyeshoko]] || [[word:kokatyeshoko|kokatyeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokatyeshoko|thokatyeshoko]] || [[word:jokatyeshoko|jokatyeshoko]] || [[word:shokatyeshoko|shokatyeshoko]] || [[word:kokatyeshoko|kokatyeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠkatyeshoko|thĂŠkatyeshoko]] || [[word:jĂŠkatyeshoko|jĂŠkatyeshoko]] || [[word:shĂŠkatyeshoko|shĂŠkatyeshoko]] || [[word:kĂŠkatyeshoko|kĂŠkatyeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakatyeshoko|thathakatyeshoko]] || [[word:jajakatyeshoko|jajakatyeshoko]] || [[word:shashakatyeshoko|shashakatyeshoko]] || [[word:kakakatyeshoko|kakakatyeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakatyeshoko|thakatyeshoko]] || [[word:jakatyeshoko|jakatyeshoko]] || [[word:shakatyeshoko|shakatyeshoko]] || [[word:kakatyeshoko|kakatyeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakatyeshoko|thakatyeshoko]] || [[word:jakatyeshoko|jakatyeshoko]] || [[word:shakatyeshoko|shakatyeshoko]] || [[word:kakatyeshoko|kakatyeshoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shakatyeshithi|shakatyeshithi]] || [[word:shakatyeshiji|shakatyeshiji]] || [[word:shakatyeshishi|shakatyeshishi]] || [[word:shakatyeshiki|shakatyeshiki]]
